pending.body: `bead_execution_history` now tries to recover stable lineage metadata by calling `find_matching_task_source_for_bead`, but that helper returns the first matching project from `list_project_ids()` (`src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:3929-3949, 4004-4025`). `FsProjectStore::list_project_ids()` is lexicographically sorted, not ordered by recency or metadata quality (`src/adapters/fs.rs:1536-1575`), so when a bead has multiple terminal projects on the same `plan_hash`, an older project without `plan_workstream_index`/`plan_bead_index` can mask a newer indexed project. In that state, history/lineage reconstruction drops back to the legacy title-only path and can still lose bead title/acceptance data or fail on title drift even though a correct indexed task source exists. The helper needs deterministic selection that prefers indexed task sources (and ideally the newest matching project), plus a regression test with two same-bead projects sharing one plan hash.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 7 -> Plan and Implement
